items.name: Peanut Butter inv
actions: Watch portioning and confirm the build/prep spec.
Verify employee meals are being rung and review waste.
Recount on-hand — check for a miscount or receiving error.

items.name: Topping, Peppermint Chopped Pieces
actions: Employee meals aren't being rung right and product is being over-portioned — watch portioning.
Submit a Product Issue form for yield loss from bad quality off the truck.

items.name: Cheese
actions: Big Six item — watch it. Count cheese slices per build; verify receiving count vs invoice.
Recount on-hand — a miscount is the usual cause of a big swing.
